tables.title: Canadian Federal Election Results 2019
tables.description: This table contains results from the 2019 Canadian Federal Election, listing candidates by riding with their party affiliations, vote counts, and vote percentages.

tables.title: Members of the Australian Senate 2022
tables.description: This table lists members of the Australian Senate as of 2022, including their states, party affiliations, and term dates for the current parliamentary session.

tables.title: FIFA World Cup 2022 Group Stage Results
tables.description: This table shows the group stage standings from the FIFA World Cup 2022, with match results, goals scored and conceded, and total points for each national team.

tables.title: Olympic Medal Tally Tokyo 2020
tables.description: This table presents the medal count for all participating countries at the Tokyo 2020 Olympic Games, broken down by gold, silver, and bronze medals.

tables.title: COVID-19 Vaccination Rates by Country
tables.description: This table tracks COVID-19 vaccination progress across countries, including total doses administered, percentage of population fully vaccinated, and booster dose coverage.

tables.title: Global Disease Burden 2019
tables.description: This table contains global burden of disease estimates for 2019, listing major diseases by region with mortality, disability-adjusted life years, prevalence, and incidence rates.

tables.title: World GDP Rankings 2023
tables.description: This table ranks countries by their gross domestic product in 2023, showing both nominal and purchasing power parity values along with annual growth rates.

tables.title: Unemployment Rates by Country 2023
tables.description: This table provides unemployment statistics for countries in 2023, including overall and youth unemployment rates and labor force participation by region.
